title: ERCOT DAM PTP Obligation Bid Awards 60 Day CSV download
description:
Day-ahead, hourly, point-to-point (PTP) obligation bid awards won by Qualified Scheduling Entities (QSEs) in ERCOT. 

DAM PTP awards are purchased at the DAM price spread but settled at the real-time price spread, this allows entities to hedge congestion costs in the real-time market. Includes the source and sink settlement points as well as the bid-price pair in each interval.
